title: eithea blumenavia
side_effects: Eithea blumenavia can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and headaches due to its high potency and potential for overstimulation of the nervous system. Prolonged use or excessive consumption can lead to stomach problems, including diarrhea and vomiting. In severe cases, it may also cause cardiovascular issues, including rapid heart rate and blood pressure fluctuations. Furthermore, interactions with other medications can exacerbate these side effects, making it crucial to consult with a healthcare professional before using Eithea blumenavia.
